meaning: Lake 琵琶湖[日本本州岛中西部]
examples: At the present, the water quality of Lake Biwa becomes better.
Various variants of Panthers were converted and mounted with "Biwa".
Yoshiaki Miyamoto hooked just one eel on his morning stint on Lake Biwa, near Kyoto.
Our charismatic translator and tribal ambassador, Lale Biwa, explained that 42 boys were about to join the ranks of the Karo elders.
